symptom: Logger will not pair or keeps dropping connection

steps.do: Confirm the logger is powered and in pairing mode (check LED pattern).
steps.why: Most loggers only advertise for a short window.

steps.do: Check battery — cold weather drops voltage fast.
Move within 1-2 m, line of sight, away from metal and other radios.
steps.why: 2.4 GHz is absorbed by bodies/metal and congested by other devices.

steps.do: Forget the device in phone Bluetooth settings, then re-pair.
Toggle phone Bluetooth off/on or restart the phone.
If it pairs but drops: reduce distance, keep the phone screen on, disable battery optimization for the app.
steps.why: Aggressive power saving suspends the BLE connection.

escalate_if: Logger never advertises even with fresh battery -> suspect logger fault; record readings manually and flag for swap.
